articles.title: Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
articles.summary: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.

articles.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
articles.summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

articles.title: Codex for (almost) everything
articles.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.

articles.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.

articles.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
articles.summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.

articles.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
articles.summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
